Parse a single CNV file using station mapper and standard stations

Source: R/ctd.R
parse_single_cnv_all.Rd

Parse a single CNV file using station mapper and standard stations

Usage

parse_single_cnv_all(file_path, station_mapper, standard_stations)

Arguments

file_path

Path to a .cnv file.

station_mapper

Data frame from load_station_mapper().

standard_stations

Data frame from load_standard_stations().

Value

A data.frame with profile data including canonical_name and region, or NULL if parsing fails or station cannot be matched.

On this page
